name: spec-loop
description: Spec-driven QA loops, browser scenarios, and scaffolded agent assets for AI-native teams.

interface.shortDescription: Run spec-driven QA loops with browser evidence.
interface.longDescription: SpecLoop adds reusable skills, browser MCP defaults, and scaffolded scripts for local or remote QA scenarios. It keeps runs read-only by default and records findings as structured evidence.
defaultPrompt: Run a SpecLoop browser QA pass.
